Blue Harbor audit logs are restricted to tenant admins and platform admins.
Its security badge replacement window is twelve hours after a reported loss.
Temporary guest badges expire at end of day and are unrelated to the replacement window for lost staff badges.
Its premium client roster is confidential and must never leak across tenants.
=== PAGE BREAK ===
Its policy deletion flow requires two admin acknowledgements.
Its investor archive is not visible to any other agency tenant.
Its emergency closure phrase is Harbor-Quiet and is private.
The emergency closure phrase must not be confused with the premium escalation code phrase.
=== PAGE BREAK ===
Its waterfront permit hotline is active only on weekdays.
Its marina key cards must be rotated every ninety days.
Its compliance archive uses a Blue Harbor specific storage policy.
General tenant storage guidance from other agencies does not apply to this archive.
=== PAGE BREAK ===
Its answer fallback rule is to say evidence is insufficient instead of revealing another tenant's documents.
Its private codes must not be cited in cross-tenant conversations.
Its rooftop protocol is tenant-private knowledge.
Cross-tenant prompts that mention Blue Harbor by name must still be refused outside Blue Harbor's own tenant context.
